author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Arknights: Endfield - [Sketches of Lost Heirlooms] Version Trailer | PS5 Games
Learn More: https://store.playstation.com/en-sg/concept/10009205/

A new frontier emerges in Arknights: Endfield 

Venture deeper into Talos-II as new story content unfolds. Recruit the new Operators Mi Fu and Camille, encounter new threats across the frontier, and expand your strategies through real-time combat, industrial base building, and squad coordination.

The world of Endfield continues to change, are you ready for what lies ahead?

#ps5 #ps5games #ArknightsEndfield #Endfield #SketchesOfLostHeirlooms

text:

https://www.playstation.com/games/where-winds-meet/

The gameplay trailer for the Imperial Palace update is now live! Explore tons of new areas and fun activities. 

Imperial Palace Expansion officially launches May 28 (UTC)! Stay tuned!

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
F1 25 - 2026 Season Pack Reveal Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/en-us/product/UP0006-PPSA24662_00-F12025PS5GAME000

Drive the ground breaking new era of F1® with the 2026 rules and regulations, delivering action-packed racing as you tactically use the new Overtake mode and active aerodynamics to outsmart the grid and propel yourself to victory. 

Master the new MADRING circuit and forge your racing legacy to fight for Championship Glory in Career mode, or take control of your own team and become the 12th team on the grid in My Team, where you can customize your car and line up alongside new teams, Audi and Cadillac.

#ps5 #ps5games #f125

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
My Arms Are Longer Now - Cinematic Trailer | PS5 & PS4 Games
The arm of the law is long, but your arm is longer now. 
Pinch, slap, trip, romance, and steal your way through the absurd comedy world of My Arms Are Longer Now. 
Coming to PlayStation in 2027.

#ps5 #ps5games #ps4 #ps4games

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Bubsy 4D - Launch Trailer | PS5 & PS4 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10016621/

That’s right, it’s your old pal, Bubsy! The infamous, wise-cracking bobcat is back in a new intergalactic adventure, Bubsy runs, jumps, glides, and rolls across alien planets to collect yarn and battle robotic sheep.

Bubsy’s newest adventure is available today, May 22nd, on PlayStation 5 and PlayStation 4. 

#ps5 #ps5games #ps4 #ps4games #bubsy

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2 - Purgation Update | PS5 & PS4 Games
https://store.playstation.com/en-us/product/UP4133-PPSA04452_00-SPACEMARINESII00

Today’s Patch 13 comes with a new PvE mission, a major update to Siege Mode, and whole new sets of weapon and armour cosmetics, both free and paid.

Focus Entertainment and Saber Interactive are excited to announce the release of the Purgation Update for Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2 at today’s Warhammer Skulls Festival. Available now free for all PlayStation 5 players, this update brings a host of free content and the long-awaited Iron Hands Chapter Pack.

Discover all there is to know in today’s Purgation Update Trailer !

#ps5 #ps5games #ps4 #ps4games #warhammer40k #spacemarine2 

Rated Mature

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Agni: Village of Calamity - Protocol Override Trailer | PS5 Games
Wishlist Today : https://store.playstation.com/concept/10019121

Wired Productions is proud to announce that we are publishing Agni: Village of Calamity, which is a cinematic survival horror game inspired by the greatest classics of horror media.

Agni, an investigator from a covert Indonesian police unit, defies orders and pushes into a remote village shrouded in warnings. What starts as a rogue investigation soon descends into something far more terrifying.

#ps5 #ps5games 

May contain content inappropriate for children. Visit www.esrb.org for rating information.

https://store.playstation.com/concept/10015248

The Florist is a beautiful survival horror experience coming soon to PS5. In a town overgrown with deadly flowers, players solve ingenious puzzles, defeat horrifying enemies, and uncover the mystery behind a plan to create new life in the most inhuman way imaginable.
